name: Iugu
description: Brazilian billing and payments platform for subscriptions, recurring charges, and marketplaces with REST API.

seo.title: Iugu — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Iugu: Brazilian billing and payments platform for subscriptions, recurring charges, and marketplaces with REST API.

when_to_use: Brazilian subscription billing and recurring charge with REST API
Marketplace split payment and subaccount management for Brazilian platforms
Boleto and PIX recurring billing for Brazilian subscription products
Automated invoicing and payment reconciliation for Brazilian SaaS

pros: Deep Brazilian payments coverage (boleto, Pix, cards)
Handles local tax and NF-e invoicing requirements
REST API suits marketplaces and subscription products
Split payments support for platform business models
cons: English documentation is incomplete in places
review.verdict: The default subscription and marketplace rail for Brazil; irrelevant if you don't sell in BRL.
review.best_for: Brazilian SaaS, marketplaces, and fintechs needing Pix, boleto, and NF-e compliance.
review.not_for: Global-first SaaS or companies without significant Brazilian revenue exposure.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
